name: Corn and Kidney Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 16-oz can red kidney beans, drained and rinsed
1/2 cup chopped scallions, including some green tops
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
1. In a small bowl or jar, whisk together 1/4 cup wine vinegar, 1 teaspoon lemon juice, 2 cloves garlic (minced), 1/2 teaspoon sugar, salt, and pepper to taste.
- Combine all the salad ingredients in a large glass or stainless steel bowl.
- Pour the dressing over the salad and mix thoroughly.
